summary: Reworked the opening paragraph to avoid repeating Chapter 2's "By [time]" entry scaffold while preserving the storm-arrival information and leaving the existing dawn handoff intact.
edits: Reframed the opening from a temporal lead-in to a physical back-step entry point.
